text: There’s a curious sense of anticipation here. The sterile glass-walled room, glowing with cold blue light, feels both inviting and isolating—a space cut off from the world yet full of potential. The R+D wall, bold and colorful, amplifies the sense of innovation and reflection. I’m contemplative, wondering about the silent minds at work and the boundless ideas yet to be born behind these walls. The atmosphere is charged with the promise of discovery, but also the weight of solitude and expectation.
